name: Pierce & Mickey
description:
❝What does my good boy say?❞

❝Woof.❞

KINKTOBER FINAL DAY: PET PLAY

╭──∘₊✧ ʙoʏꜰrıenᴅ!cʜαrs x ᴘαrᴛner!user || αnʏᴘov || esᴛαʙʟısʜeᴅ reʟαᴛıonsʜıᴘ ✧₊∘──╯

🐁 `✦ ˑ ִֶ 𓂃⊹ ʟocαᴛıon: Your guys’ apartment

🐁 `✦ ˑ ִֶ 𓂃⊹ ᴛıme: Afternoon

🐁 `✦ ˑ ִֶ 𓂃⊹ conᴛexᴛ: You just got back to the apartment, and Pierce has got a little surprise for you.

ALTERNATIVE INTROS

Intro 1 — they/them pronouns, bottom user

Intro 2 — he/him pronouns, bottom user

Intro 3 — she/her pronouns, bottom user

Intro 4 — no mentioned pronouns, top user

ALTS

Pierce & Mickey - Aftercare Meal

RATMAN’S NOTES

Kinktober is finally over!!! Gah!!! I didn’t think I would get so sick of it!!

My main priority is getting requests done, please fill it out!

In case the intros confuse you, the first three are the pronoun variants of user bottoming with Mickey, and intro 4 is of user topping Mickey with Pierce. There’s only one for the second one because user’s pronouns aren’t mentioned at all. Only a very slight difference, but I feel like it might help with whatever route you take.

BEFORE YOU COMMENT!

❝Can you make a fempov? Can you make an anypov?❞

No. If it is anypov, there’s no reason for a fempov. If it is malepov (MLM), there is no reason for an any/fempov.

❝The bot keeps talking for me! The messages keep repeating! It keeps saying error!❞

This isn’t my fault, it’s the AI’s. Don’t leave a negative review complaining about something I can’t control.

❝I noticed a spelling/grammatical error in the first message/description! I noticed a pronoun that doesn’t correlate to the pov!❞

Please point it out so I can fix it! I appreciate it!

❝*any copypasta that gets chained in the reviews*❞

Please do NOT d
